Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Shery Longest, Judgment debtor in Propria Persona

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. The Claim of exemption is Granted. The judgment debtor provided proof of the claimed exemption. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Feb-05-2008 Continued To Feb-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Shery Longest, Judgment debtor in Propria Persona

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED is vacated. The Hearing on claim of exemption is continued to Friday, February 8, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 610. Debtor to provide proof of social security deposit. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
